name: Lemonade Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Beat the egg yolks until thick.
3. Gradually add 3/4 cup of sugar to the egg yolks, then add 3/4 cup of thawed lemonade concentrate, alternating with the flour mixture.
4. Beat the egg whites and remaining sugar until stiff peaks form. Fold into the lemon mixture.
5. Spread the batter in a greased and floured jelly roll pan.
6. Bake at 375°F for 15 to 20 minutes. Immediately loosen the sides of the cake and invert it onto a towel sprinkled generously with powdered sugar.
7. Let the cake cool on a rack.
8. Prepare the vanilla whip dessert mix according to directions, substituting 1/4 cup lemonade concentrate instead of water.
9. Unroll the cake, spread the filling, and re-roll.
